name: Forge Admin
description: Full administrative access to Forge CRM: manage all records (accounts, contacts, deals, interactions, BRDs, requirements), configure lookup tables, and delete records.

name: Forge Editor
description: Write access to Forge CRM: create and edit accounts, contacts, deals, interactions, BRDs, requirements, and lookup configuration. Cannot delete records.

name: Forge Viewer
description: Read-only access to Forge CRM: view accounts, contacts, deals, interactions, BRDs, and requirements. Cannot create, modify, or delete any records.
